translations.en: a distinguished looking gentleman.
translations.zh: 儀表堂堂、氣度不凡的紳士。

translations.en: "Greetings, $G, and welcome to the town of Cove."
translations.zh: 「你好，$G，歡迎來到海灣鎮。」

translations.en: "Ah, $P! 'Tis an honor to welcome thee once more to my humble village."
translations.zh: 「啊，$P！能再次歡迎汝蒞臨敝鎮，實乃榮幸。」

translations.en: "How might I be of assistance this fine $T?"
translations.zh: 「此番$T，有何能效勞之處？」

translations.en: "I am the Viscount Ahrmaand. And what is thy name?"
translations.zh: 「吾乃子爵阿赫曼德。汝名如何？」

translations.en: "Well met, $G!"
"I govern here in @Cove. 'Tis hard work, but my people love me for it."
translations.zh: 「吾在@Cove（海灣）鎮治政，雖勞苦，但深得民心。」

translations.en: *"I always thought it a blessing to live so close to a @shrine, though since the gargoyles came none dare go near it."
translations.zh: *「吾向來以為，能居於@shrine（聖壇）附近實乃福氣，然自魔像族到來，無人敢再靠近。」

translations.en: "We have fine facilities here for healing the wounded and the @sick."
translations.zh: 「吾鎮設有上等療傷設施，可照料傷者與@sick（病人）。」

translations.en: "In Britannia there are eight shrines, one for each of the eight @virtues of the Avatar."
translations.zh: 「不列顛尼亞共有八處聖壇，對應聖者的八大@virtues（美德），各一處。」

translations.en: "They are places where people can go to meditate on these virtues."
translations.zh: 「那是供人前往冥想美德的場所。」

translations.en: "The virtues are honesty, compassion, valour, justice, sacrifice, honor, spirituality, and humility."*
translations.zh: 「八大美德乃：誠實、慈悲、勇氣、正義、犧牲、榮譽、靈性與謙遜。」*

translations.en: "'Tis good to @meditate on these virtues often."
translations.zh: 「時常@meditate（冥想）這些美德，大有裨益。」

translations.en: "Each shrine has its own @mantra. This is a chant which one should recite whilst meditating therein."
translations.zh: 「每處聖壇都有專屬的@mantra（真言），冥想時應吟誦之。」

translations.en: "Once there was a time when a special rune was required to enter each shrine as well."
translations.zh: 「昔日，進入每處聖壇還需持有特定的符文。」

translations.en: "Now the gargoyles have taken the Shrine of Compassion, and it is lost to the people once more."
translations.zh: 「如今魔像族已佔據慈悲聖壇，人們再次無從親近。」

translations.en: "A party of adventurers came here after their attempt to defeat the gargoyles at the Shrine of Compassion."*
translations.zh: 「一隊冒險者曾前往慈悲聖壇嘗試擊退魔像族，之後來到此地。」*

translations.en: "I spoke with their @leader when they arrived."
translations.zh: 「他們抵達時，吾曾與其@leader（領隊）交談。」

translations.en: "Thou shouldst speak with him thyself. He told of a strange violet energy field."
translations.zh: 「汝當親自與其一談。他提到了一道奇異的紫色能量場。」

translations.en: "I think mayhap 'tis similar to the @force which blocked entry to the shrines many years ago."*
translations.zh: 「吾以為，此與多年前阻擋人進入聖壇的那股@force（力量）頗為相似。」*

translations.en: "The eight mystic runes were most useful in those days."
translations.zh: 「昔日，八枚神秘符文極為有用。」

translations.en: "He's in bed at Sasha's, recuperating."
translations.zh: 「他在莎夏那裡臥床休養。」

translations.en: "Use the Rune of Compassion whilst chanting the @Mantra of Compassion."
translations.zh: 「使用慈悲符文，同時吟唱@Mantra（真言）真言。」

translations.en: "Methinks this may negate the gargoyle's magic at that shrine."
translations.zh: 「吾以為，此法或許能破除聖壇上魔像族的魔法。」

translations.en: "Ask Lord British's Chancellor, Tholden."
translations.zh: 「去問問不列顛王的宰相索登。」

translations.en: "He canst tell thee of the mantra, and like as not he will also know of the rune."
translations.zh: 「他能告知汝真言，也很可能知曉符文之事。」

translations.en: "Twas a delight to converse with thee, my dear."
translations.zh: 「與汝攀談，實是一大樂事，吾的朋友。」

translations.en: "My heart will be aflutter with anticipation till thou dost visit me again."
translations.zh: 「吾將心懷期盼，盼汝再次蒞臨。」

translations.en: "Farewell sirrah, and good luck with thy quest."
translations.zh: 「告辭，祝汝試煉順遂。」

translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「此事吾幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "Ah, $P, thou hast come back to get better acquainted!"
translations.zh: 「啊，$P，汝回來是為了進一步相識！」

translations.en: "$P, seeing thee again, I feel as if the clouds have parted to reveal the sun once more."
translations.zh: 「$P，再次見到汝，吾彷彿感到雲開日現。」

translations.en: "Milady $P! If thou art as happy to see me as I to see thee, then this must be for thee a joyous occasion indeed."
translations.zh: 「夫人$P！若汝見吾之喜悅如吾見汝，則此刻對汝亦必是歡欣時刻。」

translator_notes: Ahrmaand 海灣鎮子爵，說話優雅，用 thee/thou 古體。對女性玩家有額外殷切語句。
